title: Bloxy's Bosses
description: Adds 10 more Bosses to the game!
body:
Hello Warrior! Are you looking for more Bosses to Fight in your world?
Well, let me present to you... Bloxys Bosses! This mod adds 10 New Bosses to your Minecraft world. With more to come in future Updates. 

Curios API is REQUIRED

Here is some information about the Bosses

 

This new boss is the older brother of The Blaze, firing fireballs faster and bigger fireballs at the player than a normal one. If you manage to defeat it you'll earn the "Blazing Rod" which are more powerful Blaze Rods and an all-new fuel for your furnaces!

You can also use the Blazing Powder to brew the new Blazing's Grace potion, giving you fire resistance for 16 minutes


This is the Zombie King, he can call hordes of nearby Zombies to attack you as Zombies in the Monumental Plains ALWAYS spawn with Armor and Swords at the ready, so beware.
When the Zombie King loses 50 half-hearts it'll summon 4 zombies to aid it in battle and jump towards the player and up if the player builds.

When you defeat it, it'll drop it's crown. Negating 50% of all Damage from Undead Mobs

This is the Wandering Enderman, he wanders with his backpack having all the essentail combat weapons he could need like throwing Ender Dragon Fireballs at the player or wither skulls, teleporting all around the player as evasive maneuvers. Though if you manage to slay it, you'll get an Ender Rune.

The ender rune negates 50% of all Magic Damage and makes you able to look at Endermen without angering them.

When you make your first mistake challenging Technoblade, you'll meet him in base-form.
His combat is like a plyer, but also throwing wither skulls at the player. 

Upon Defeating Technoblade, he will drop 16 Golden Porkchops, which gives you 20 Nutritional and Saturation points.
He will also drop a new Charm, the Wither's Vein. Negates 50% of Wither Damage.

After defeating base-form Technoblade he will go on to fight the Kingdom of God. Where he'll win of course, which results in him turning Godlike. Now it's time for him to repay your injustice a thousand times over. 

He will place a portal where he was first defeated. When you enter you will be teleported to the Kingdom of God, where you will stand face-to-face against Godlike Technoblade.
#Technoblade25 and TECHNOBLADE NEVER DIES!

This is the Creeper King, he spawns TNT from the skies above the player as airstrikes.
The king will also summon small Creeper Minions to aid it in battle, watch out!

When you defeat it, it will drop the Creeper's Ring. A charm that negates 50% of Explosion Damage. 

This is the God of Thunder, he wields Mjolnir. A thunder infused hammer that smites thunder wherever the user wishes. Thor will use this to his advantage. Along with Ender Pearls and using potions like Speed and Strength.

When you defeat Thor, he will drop Mjolnir. Allowing the player to smite Thunder and as a good axe

This is the oldest anarchy server on Minecraft.. Wait wrong line, hes a 2b2t veteran.
He will use his End Crystals and knowledge of PVP against the player, utilizing Ender Pearls, Arrows and launching into the air placing an End Crystals for the player to dodge below.

When you defeat FitMC, he will drop the End Crystal Fragment. A charm that negates 100% of Elytra Kinetic Damage so the damage you take from flying into the side of a wall, it also allows the player to be healed by End Crystals like the End Dragon.

This is Philza Minecraft, yes the Creator of Minecraft. (totally)
He utilizes his knowledge of the game and the use of Totem of Undyings agains the player, meaning your gonna have to defeat him twice, while he uses Ender Pearls, potions and Arrows against you.

When you defeat Philza, he will drop the Charm of Undying. When you wear the Charm of Undying and you use a Totem, you will earn the following extra effects.
- Resistance for 22s
- Invincibility for 12s
- Strength II for 12s
- Fully Healed

This is Grian, the builder who built the builders. The master of Blocks so he'll use them against you. Materializing cobblestone out of nothing as they fly above Grian ready to be thrown at whatever crosses his path dealing massive damage. While also using Ender Pearls
When you defeat Grian, he will drop "Grian's Feather" negating fall-damage by 50%

This is PrestonPlayz, the personification of pure fire. He always has fire-aspect when attacking the player, he also shoots Fireballs like the Ghast and Blaze at the player to spice things up.

When you defeat PrestonPlayz, he will drop "Preston's Fire Essence" negating all ON-FIRE Damage and enchants the player with Fire Apect, allowing them to ignite entities without the need of Fire Aspect on tools.

 

This is The Monumental Plains, the biome where you'll find all the Bosses Monuments. Simply right-click their head and they'll spawn for you to fight against!



The mod is made with the use of Mcreator and Blockbench

The bosses were balanced around Diamond Protection 4 - I highly suggest getting that too when fighting all of the bosses.

Feel free to add it to any Modpacks
